content.content: Actress well known for her recurring roles on television series such as Sparrowhawk and Don't Do This Don't Do That. In the shows, she plays Louise and Tiphaine Bouley-Lepic, respectively. She has also appeared in films including Anna and Otto, Smart Ass, and The Stars. She launched her professional acting career in 2009, playing the roles of Pauline in the TV movie Duel in Town and Lisa in the drama film Queen to Play. She played Elisa in the 2015 short film Animals Do Not Bury Themselves. Her gentilalexandra Instagram page features behind the scenes content, career highlights and photos from her daily life. In May 2022, she appeared in a show at L'Odéon-Théâtre de l'Europe. She is originally from France. She portrayed the role of Lisa in the award-winning drama film Queen to Play, along with castmatesSandrine BonnaireandKevin Kline.
